name: AK-12
in_game_description: Jack-of-all trades gun with a unique burst-fire mode that increases the weapon's power significantly if you can use it right. Model submitted by Rialag.
overview:
Weapon Class: Assault Rifle
Rank Required: 0
Damage dealt on head: 46.2→29.4; On torso: 33→21; On limb: 33→21
Velocity: 2950 studs/sec
Range: 70→160
Magazine: 30+1
Fire Rate: 700 RPM A & S | 1000 RPM 3x B

name: M16A4
in_game_description: A traditional AR-15 platform assault rifle as used by the US military. This version features a burst-fire trigger group. Very accurate with low recoil and a long range.
overview:
Weapon Class: Assault Rifle
Rank Required: 22
Damage dealt on head: 51→33; On torso: 34→22; On limb: 34→22
Velocity: 3100 studs/sec
Range: 40→150
Magazine: 30+1
Fire Rate: 900 RPM 3× Burst & Semi
